# Processor by Instruction Agreement Template

Draft only. Requires legal completion.

## Parties

- Operator: `[operator legal name: TODO]` acting for Olga Zinchenko's Telegram nutrition-navigation service
- Processor by instruction: `[developer / contractor legal name or full name: TODO]`

## Subject Matter

The operator поручает the processor to process personal data strictly for technical support, maintenance, development, migration, debugging, or other agreed technical tasks related to Olga Zinchenko's Telegram wellness service.

## Categories of Data

The processor may potentially encounter:
- client identification data,
- contact data,
- case metadata,
- uploaded documents,
- health-related context and analyses,
- generated reports,
- technical logs.

## Purposes

Processing by the processor is limited to:
- software support,
- bug fixing,
- infrastructure maintenance,
- migration,
- backup or recovery support,
- other explicitly instructed technical tasks.

## Restrictions

The processor shall not:
- determine independent purposes of processing,
- use data for its own interests,
- disclose data to third parties without instruction,
- keep copies longer than necessary,
- access more data than needed for the assigned task.

## Security Obligations

The processor shall:
- maintain confidentiality,
- restrict access to authorized persons only,
- protect credentials,
- log or document access where required,
- report incidents without delay,
- delete temporary copies after task completion.

## Access Model

Default model:
- no permanent production access,
- time-limited access by task,
- minimum necessary scope,
- documented approval by operator.

## Return / Deletion

Upon completion or termination:
- return data where applicable,
- delete local or temporary copies,
- confirm deletion if requested.

## Liability and Instructions

The processor acts only on documented instructions from the operator unless required otherwise by law.
